app.title: Show HN: Apple's Sharp Running in the Browser via ONNX Runtime Web
app.author: bring-shrubbery
app.description: ONNX Runtime Web enables running .NET and C# on web platforms.
proposed_tests: Try running the demo .NET Sharp browser app
Verify the app uses ONNX Runtime Web API
